CustomField.description: Instructional text injected into the LLM prompt when this error category is encountered. Guides the LLM on how to handle or communicate the error to the end user.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Prompt text added to the LLM context when this error occurs. Example: A permission error occurred. Apologize and tell the user they may not have access to this record.
CustomField.label: LLM Guidance
